Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype

Class DatatypeLexer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype.DatatypeLexer
All Implemented Interfaces:
ILexer
public class DatatypeLexer extends Object implements ILexer
This lexer proxy collapses any stream of tokens that represents a recursive call to a datatype to a single token with the name of the datatype. Otherwise, it delegates to the normal lexer.

For instance, when building a datatype DT with type parameters X and Y, the stream of tokens "DT", "(", "X", ",", "Y", ")" is replaced with just "DT".

This class is intended to be used only when the datatype has type parameters.

      public Token makeEOF()
      Description copied from interface: ILexer
      Returns an end-of-file token at the current position. Useful when lexing is broken and we cannot recover from previous errors.
      Specified by:
      makeEOF in interface ILexer
      Returns:
      an end-of-file token
